chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C.P.No.D-296 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No. 1891/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 3. For hearing of main case. ------ 04.06.2025 M/s. Wakeel Ali Shaikh and Irfan Ali Jatoi, Advocates for the Petitioners. Mr. Asif Hussain Chandio, Advocate for the Respondents. Mr. Riaz Hussain Khoso, D.A.G ------ 1. Urgency granted. 2-3. Learned counsel submits that the petitioners being residents of Gate No.2, Professors Colony, Larkana are facing severe hardships due to acute shortage of electricity, therefore, through this petition, they seek directions to respondents No.1 to 4 to provide 100 KVA Transformer, for which the petitioners and other inhabitants of the colony are ready to bear the expenses likely to be incurred upon installation of the transformer after providing proper requisite documents as per policy of SEPCO in accordance with law. Learned counsel for the respondents present in Court in some other matters, waives notice of the petition and submits that objections to the petition have already been filed on behalf of the respondents. He further submits that grievance of the petitioners would be resolved if they provide requisite documents to the office of respondent No.4 (Manager, Planning and Development Department, CEO, SEPCO Office, Sukkur under the rules and policy in accordance with law. Learned counsel for the petitioners being satisfied submits that the requisite documents will be submitted to office of respondent No.4 and the petitioners are agree to pay such an amount under Demand Notice issued by respondent No.4 and seeks disposal of instant petition in above terms.

He further submits that grievance of the petitioners would be resolved if they provide requisite documents to the office of respondent No.4 (Manager, Planning and Development Department, CEO, SEPCO Office, Sukkur under the rules and policy in accordance with law. Learned counsel for the petitioners being satisfied submits that the requisite documents will be submitted to office of respondent No.4 and the petitioners are agree to pay such an amount under Demand Notice issued by respondent No.4 and seeks disposal of instant petition in above terms. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of with directions to respondents No.4 & 5 that if the requisite documents under the policy will be submitted by the petitioners, the procedure for installation of 100KVA Transformer shall be completed within 30 days after receipt of the documents and payment. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge Manzoor
